docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,082.50 FILED BY GATEHOUSE RESTAURANT AS TO DEFENDANT TURN KEY SYSTEMS COMSTOCK, ANDRES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GATEHOUSE RESTAURANT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TURN KEY SYSTEMS $1,082.50 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,118.50, PLTF TO RETURN THE ICE MACHINE TO DEFENDANT UPON RECEIPT OF THE $1082.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
